application.name: RAZ Laguna II phase 2
application.description: erases failures on Laguna II phase 2

application.name: RAZ Megane II Ph 2 (no trace)
application.description: erases failures on Megane II Ph 2

applications.name: Specific UCE
applications.description: Erase one or more UCE (no project)

application.name: RAZ ECM (K line - no trace)
application.description: erases failures on ECM on K line (no trace)

application.name: Read Failures Laguna II phase 2
application.description: read failures on Laguna II phase 2

applications.name: RAZ and Read Failures (no trace)
applications.description: Groups failure erasing and reading applications

application.name: X85/X77Ph2 500 ms
application.description: erase and read failures on X85/X77Ph2 projects

application.name: X85/X77Ph2 800 ms
application.description: erase and read failures on X85/X77Ph2 projects

application.name: X85/X77Ph2 1100 ms
application.description: erase and read failures on X85/X77Ph2 projects

applications.name: Super Sleep
applications.description: Sets car in super sleep mode

application.name: Super Sleep J77/X85/X84
application.description: Sets J77/X85 VAC/X84/X85 VSC in super sleep mode

application.name: Super Sleep X91
application.description: Sets X91 in super sleep mode

application.name: Super Sleep X62
application.description: Sets X62 in super sleep mode

applications.name: ECM simulator
applications.description: Simulates ECM for keeping AT happy

application.name: ECM simulator 250 kbds
application.description: Simulates ECM for reprogramming at 250 kbds

application.name: ECM simulator 500 kbds
application.description: Simulates ECM for reprogramming at 500 kbds

applications.name: UCH/UPC simulator
applications.description: Simulates UCH and UPC for keeping Dashboard alive

application.name: UCH/UPC Modus simulator
application.description: Simulates UCH and UPC for keeping Dashboard alive (Modus)

applications.name: Simulation vitesse et rapports BVM
applications.description: Simulates car speed and gear shift

application.name: APB player X73 X81 250 kbds
application.description: Player of state for the parking brake for X73 and X81 at 250 kbds with action button

application.name: Tracking bug Meter Cluster
application.description: Save values of Meter Cluster at zero display oil level

application.name: RAZWithOdometerValueInAPV V1
application.description: erases failures on X91 with writing the odometer value on label APV of ABS-ABS/ASP

application.name: RAZWith10C0_Odometer V1
application.description: erases failures on X91 with sending 10C0 init and writing the odometer value on label APV of ABS-ABS/ASP

application.name: RAZ-Player DTC CANV 250ms Beta5
application.description: erases failures on X91 and read DTC in bus CAN Vehicle

application.name: RAZ-Player DTC CANM 250ms Beta5
application.description: erases failures on X91 and read DTC in bus CAN Multimedia

application.name: RAZ-Player DTC CANV 500ms Beta5
application.description: erases failures on X91 and read DTC in bus CAN Vehicle

application.name: RAZ-Player DTC CANM 500ms Beta5
application.description: erases failures on X91 and read DTC in bus CAN Multimedia

application.name: RAZ-Player DTC CANV 1,1ms Beta5
application.description: erases failures on X91 and read DTC in bus CAN Vehicle

application.name: RAZ-Player DTC CANM 1,1ms Beta5
application.description: erases failures on X91 and read DTC in bus CAN Multimedia

application.name: APB player X91 500 kbds
application.description: Player of state for the automatic parking brake for X91 at 500 kbds

application.name: Release APB X91 500 kbds
application.description: Release with action button the automatic parking brake for X91 at 500 kbds

application.name: ReleaseFPAx95
application.description: Release with action button the automatic parking brake for X95 at 500 kbds

application.name: SOCx38VE61VE_V2_2010_07_16
application.description: Indicate the level charge of the batterie for X38VE and X61 VE at 500 kbds

application.name: rvlv (500 kbds)
application.description: Loop on RVLV Read on Megane, Modus, ...

application.name: rvlv (250 kbds)
application.description: Loop on RVLV Read on Laguna, Espace, ...
